title: PixyCAD - Powerful 3D CAD, Beautifully Simple
content_html:
Made for makers and 3D printing enthusiasts, designed for everyone. 3D CAD for macOS and iPadOS that anyone can pick up and start creating with.

Watch Videos

Most CAD tools feel heavy, complex, and slow to iterate. PixyCAD strips away that friction so you can go from idea to solid model to 3D print -whether you're a seasoned maker or designing your very first object.

Built for a Fast Maker Workflow

Every tool is tuned for rapid changes and experimentation. You see what matters: your model.

Apple Pencil–First on iPad

Sketch your idea with Apple Pencil, then turn it into a precise 3D model -no CAD experience needed.

Lightning Fast, On-Device

Metal-optimized and runs entirely on your device. Rotate, pan, and edit even detailed models smoothly -no lag, logins, or cloud delays.

Work Where You Want

Start on iPad with Apple Pencil, refine on Mac with keyboard and mouse. Your workflow stays consistent across devices.

Quick Iteration

Create, Adjust and Tweak. See what matters: your model and your measurements.

Gentle Learning Curve

Your first steps in 3D design feel as natural as sketching a doodle. Tools that feel approachable on day one and stay powerful as your skills grow.

Print-Ready Formats

Export STL and 3MF for slicing and printing. STEP and Parasolid X_T for collaboration with other CAD tools or sharing with manufacturers.

Design Faster, Design Smarter,
Design Happily

Made for makers, designed for everyone. Download PixyCAD and start creating.

requires iPadOS 26.0+ or macOS 15.0+ with Apple Silicon

Sign up to stay updated on PixyCAD news
